task:
there's a couple of warning/error dialogs we show to the user - e.g. low battery, low disk space etc 

Can we remove the dialog popups - they're annoying as hell, or at least at an option in settings for someone to select if they want those popups or not
user_feedback_text:
there's a couple of warning/error dialogs we show to the user - e.g. low battery, low disk space etc 

Can we remove the dialog popups - they're annoying as hell, or at least at an option in settings for someone to select if they want those popups or not

task:
Cool, I've removed it myself.

Next thing I need is you see what we show on the menu bar? I want the user to be able to individually select which items they want on the menu bar, with a max of 3 items e.g. disk, battery, network, memory etc
Cool, stop the currently running WhatTheLoad app, delete it and install a new release build (update the version/build number as well)
user_feedback_text: Cool, stop the currently running WhatTheLoad app, delete it and install a new release build (update the version/build number as well)

task: is it possible to use small icons instead of saying DSK, CPU?
user_feedback_text: is it possible to use small icons instead of saying DSK, CPU?

task:
Then for disk, let's show used instead of free, and just show the percentage

then yes kill the app and reinstall
user_feedback_text:
